concerns.text: Phase 14 (Packaging) has no explicit FR/SC mapping. While the work (requirements.txt, pyproject.toml) is justified by FR-009 (CI compatibility) and FR-028 (Quickstart), the plan should explicitly map this phase to those requirements for traceability.

Summary states 'All FR‑001…FR‑032 and SC‑001…SC‑032 are explicitly covered' but the spec does not contain all FR/SC numbers in those ranges (e.g., FR-005, FR-006, FR-008, SC-002, SC-004, etc. do not exist). This is misleading and should be corrected to list only the actual FR/SC IDs that exist.
